meta.public_notes: Portland takes a timeout @ 16:19 of the 3rd period.
meta.private_notes:
1st period ended @ 7: 00, 1st intermission started @ 7:01, 2nd period started @ 7: 19
2nd period ended @ 7:57 ,  2nd intermission started @ 7:58 , 3rd period started @ 8:16

Seattle penalty @ 15:41 is listed as Unsportsmanlike Cnd., 2, 57. Actual call was for a 'Minor' Hair Pulling. The only penalty on the drop down list is a 'Major' penalty for hair pulling. Therefore unsportsmanlike cnd was selected.
